home.createRoomInfo: A unique room code will be generated for you. Share it with friends to invite them.

roleDesc.wolf: Pretend to be an innocent villager during the day, but at night you become a beast hunting victims with your wolf pack.
roleDesc.villager: A simple citizen with no special powers, but your voice is your strongest weapon. Observe, think, and vote to expose the wolves.
roleDesc.seer: You have supernatural vision that reveals any player's true identity. Your information is precious — share it wisely.
roleDesc.witch: You have two one-time magical potions. Think carefully before using them.
roleDesc.doctor: The village's loyal doctor. Each night you choose a player to protect from wolf attacks.
roleDesc.hunter: A brave warrior who doesn't fear death. If killed, you fire your last bullet at a player of your choice.

abilities.wolfHuntDesc: Vote with wolves to choose a victim · Secret voice channel open only for you
abilities.wolfDisguiseDesc: Participate in discussion and vote as if innocent
abilities.seerVisionDesc: Reveal a player's identity each night · Wolf or Villager
abilities.seerLogDesc: Accumulate your findings night after night
abilities.witchSaveDesc: Save the wolf's victim from death · Once per game
abilities.witchKillDesc: Kill a suspected player · Once per game
abilities.docProtectDesc: Protect a player each night · No same player twice in a row
abilities.hunterShotDesc: Triggered upon your death · Choose your target quickly

night.title: Darkness falls...
night.willDie: Will die if you don't intervene
night.waitingForWolves: ⏳ Waiting for wolves to choose their victim...

day.title: Daytime
day.discussion: Free discussion with voice and camera

hunter.lastShot: You have one last bullet. Choose who leaves with you!
hunter.whoToTake: Who do you take with you?
